item.title: Franco Nero Shares the 'Profound Lesson' from Wife Vanessa Redgrave That Shaped His Career
item.description: Franco Nero and Vanessa Redgrave met on the set of the 1967 musical 'Camelot'; after decades apart, they married in 2006

item.title: Nick Jonas' Advice on Getting Wives Onboard with a Squatty Potty: 'Shouldn't Get in the Way of Your Relationship'
item.description: The singer has been married to wife Priyanka Chopra Jonas since 2018

item.title: Piper Rockelle Says Former 'Piper Squad' Costars' Abuse Lawsuit Against Her Mom Brought Them ‘Closer’
item.description: The former child star appears in the Feb. 12 episode of ‘IMPACT x Nightline,’ where she addressed her mom’s legal woes

item.title: Blake Lively and Justin Baldoni: Could They Still Settle Their “It Ends With Us” Case? (Exclusive)
item.description: After failing to settle in mediation, Blake Lively and Justin Baldoni are gearing for a May trial, though legal experts say a deal is still possible

item.title: CNN's Kaitlan Collins, a Frequent Target of Trump, Said Karoline Leavitt Once Stepped In When Saudi Guards 'Freaked Out' at Her
item.description: The White House correspondent shared an anecdote from last May, when the White House press secretary helped her out during an overseas trip despite th...
